definition: A fundamental concept in Natural Language Processing under Text Processing, representing Stemming.
simple_explanation: Think of Stemming as an essential building block of Natural Language Processing. It is commonly used within Text Processing.
technical_explanation: In production Natural Language Processing systems, Stemming plays a key role within Text Processing. Engineering implementations must account for scaling constraints and design trade-offs.
